notes: PRIMARY: DN-GEO-03060 'Geometric Design of Junctions (priority junctions, direct accesses, roundabouts, grade separated and compact grade separated junctions)', Rev 03, May 2023 - current/active in-force revision (supersedes 2017 Rev 02). Chapter 7 covers grade-separated and compact grade-separated junctions; Section 7.9 covers weaving; merges/diverges/lane gain/lane drop included. Confirmed 'Published/Active' on official TII document page id=3253. SECONDARY (historical, WITHDRAWN 2017, kept as reference for detailed merge/diverge/weaving geometric tables): DN-GEO-03035-05.pdf 'Layout of Grade Separated Junctions' (NRA addendum to TD 22/06), bytes=7325718, pages=114, sha256=224be696ab7a344f8cce0cd8261b3787b80fee59790baf8b17f786bb3232d418, source https://www.tiipublications.ie/library/DN-GEO-03035-05.pdf - superseded by DN-GEO-03060. The at-grade priority junctions/roundabouts content is also consolidated within the primary DN-GEO-03060. Downloads via tiipublications.ie/library/ which 302-redirects to cdn.tii.ie/publications/ (official TII CDN).
